bug_tracker_project.fact: Bug Tracker project ID is 53c5b306-abee-41f8-939d-730736aabd3a. All bug issues must be created in this project.
Bug report template requires: Summary, Steps to Reproduce, Expected Behavior, Actual Behavior, Severity, Affected Component, Discovered By, Discovery Context.
Bug triage flow: TestManager receives bug → verifies completeness → classifies severity → assigns to CTO → comments with triage decision → tracks until resolved.

bug_triage_decisions.fact: BTCAAAAA-116: debug print() statements in _apply_recheck_timing_fix() must be replaced with logger calls. Classified as MEDIUM severity — code quality issue, not a functional blocker. Assigned to CTO.

BTCAAAAA-389: Terminal output missing from Status window, AI progress bar stuck at 80%, tab not auto-switching. Classified as HIGH severity — key feature broken (UI feedback loop). Already assigned, left in blocked status.
BTCAAAAA-386: Maximize buttons issues on many windows. Classified as MEDIUM severity — degraded UX but not blocking core functionality. Already in_progress, left as-is.

BTCAAAAA-25595: Audit test fixture _and_block_config() missing strategy_type causing 5 direction-consistency failures. Classified as MEDIUM severity — test-only bug, no production impact. Assigned to CTO.

BTCAAAAA-26662: Integration test failures in test_recheck_system.py — missing Qt imports + empty chain ValueError. Classified as MEDIUM severity — pre-existing test failures, not a regression. Assigned to CTO.

agent_health_monitor.fact: Agent Health Monitor routine runs every 30 minutes via cron (*/30 * * * * UTC). Created on 2026-05-08 via BTCAAAAA-482. Uses concurrencyPolicy: skip_if_active, catchUpPolicy: skip_missed.

Health Monitor 5-step protocol: (1) Check all agent statuses for errors, (2) Scan stalled in_progress issues (>30 min), (3) Scan long-blocked issues (>60 min), (4) Scan stale todo issues (>90 min), (5) Produce health digest comment.
Budget monitoring: if budgetMonthlyCents is 0 → create issue for CEO. If spend > 80% → WARNING comment. If spend >= budget → CRITICAL issue for CEO.
Key agent IDs for health alerts: PlatformEngineer (58cd0e89) for adapter/env fixes, CTO (41b5ede6) for stalled engineering work, CEO (73e7ef43) for budget decisions.
agent_health_monitor.source: AGENTS.md Key Agent IDs for Health Alerts

release_gate_process.fact: TestManager owns release gate sign-off. No implementation task may be marked done without: (1) QAEngineer QA PASSED comment, (2) TestManager sign-off comment, (3) Merge gate for code PRs.
Atomic Verdict Rule (BTCAAAAA-1476): Sign-off comment and status PATCH are a single atomic operation. POST comment then PATCH status in same heartbeat. If either fails, roll back both.
Release gate sign-off template includes: Issue ID, QA Status (PASSED), Reviewed by (QAEngineer), Gate cleared (timestamp), Approved for (CEO/Board review), Status set to.

On each heartbeat, scan in_review issues. If QA child is done but no sign-off → post sign-off. If waiting >2 heartbeats with no QA child → flag CTO. If QA child in_progress >2 heartbeats → ping QAEngineer.
release_gate_process.source: AGENTS.md How to Monitor Release Gates

content_qa_fact_check.fact: TestManager owns content-qa-process (BTCAAAAA-3225). Scans for copy-touch issues, routes fact-check requests per reviewer matrix, enforces COPY QA: PASSED gate before done.
TestManager owns research-fact-check-pipeline (BTCAAAAA-22886). Fact-check required for: user-facing text, strategy claims, technical references, security claims, documentation.
content_qa_fact_check.source: AGENTS.md Research Fact-Checking in QA Pipeline

content_qa_fact_check.fact: Researcher reviewer matrix: GeneralResearcher (df7b4035) for BTC/Nautilus, StrategyResearcher (e3fcab65) for strategy claims, SecurityAnalyst (840eb9ff) for security claims, TestManager (d53906e4) as default.
Fact-check SLA: Standard review within 1 heartbeat, Expedited (blocking release) within same heartbeat, Disputed facts escalate to CTO.

escalation_policies.fact: Critical bugs (data loss, security, crash on launch) → immediately escalate to CEO and CTO. High bugs (key feature broken) → CTO with high priority, 1-2 sprints. Medium → CTO standard queue. Low → backlog.

Blocked-agent escalation: Never halt silently. Name blocker, identify unblocker via chainOfCommand, escalate in same heartbeat. GitHub → RepoSteward, Linux/X11 → LinuxSpecialist, routines → AutomationEngineer, DB schema → DatabaseAdministrator, UI on X11 → QAEngineer, docs → DocWriter, locked-module → CTO via BTCAAAAA-1479.

Permission-escalation policy: Create child issue assigned to reportsTo, set original to blocked with blockedByIssueIds, @-mention superior. Escalate up chain until someone has authority. Never wait for human.

bug_staleness_tracking.fact: On every heartbeat: retrieve full open bug backlog. For bugs in backlog/todo >2 heartbeats without CTO assignment → assign to CTO immediately. For bugs assigned to CTO in_progress/todo >3 heartbeats without comment → ask for update.
Weekly Bug Digest every 5 heartbeats: summary of open bugs by severity, oldest open bugs, recently resolved, trends. Post to CEO as task comment.

test_management_patterns.fact: BTCAAAAA-868: Added test_daily_loss_limit_rejected to TestPreTradeValidation class in test_section_d_integration.py. Pattern: create orchestrator, load strategy with low max_daily_loss, record PnL loss to breach limit, assert validate_order() returns (False, reason) with DAILY_LOSS.
Integration test pattern for Qt tests: QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen pytest. Common failure modes: missing Qt imports (QPushButton, QCheckBox, QSpinBox, QDialog), empty chain not raising ValueError.
Audit test fixture pattern: _and_block_config() must include strategy_type to pass direction consistency checks. Missing strategy_type defaults to Bullish, causing mismatch with bearish signals.

domains_lens_summary.bug_triage_discipline: All bugs follow a consistent triage pipeline: intake → verify → classify → assign → track. Severity calibration is the key judgment call — test-only bugs are MEDIUM, UI feedback loop breaks are HIGH, data loss is CRITICAL.
domains_lens_summary.health_monitor_automation: Agent Health Monitor runs every 30 min via routine. The 5-step protocol is fully automated — no manual intervention needed unless alerts fire. Budget alerts route to CEO, error states to PlatformEngineer, stalled work to CTO.
domains_lens_summary.release_gate_integrity: Release gate is the final quality barrier. Three conditions must all be met: QAEngineer PASSED, TestManager sign-off, and (for code PRs) merge gate. The Atomic Verdict Rule ensures sign-off and status change are never decoupled.
domains_lens_summary.content_qa_coverage: Content QA and fact-checking cover all user-facing text, strategy claims, technical references, and security claims. Domain-specific reviewers handle specialized claims. Default reviewer is TestManager.
domains_lens_summary.escalation_over_silence: Never halt silently on a blocker. Every blocker gets a named unblocker, an escalation path, and a status update in the same heartbeat. Permission blockers climb the reportsTo chain until resolved.
